# Michigan Phenology
> A real-time phenology dashboard for Saginaw Bay and northeastern Michigan by Chris Izworski: live river conditions, projected hatches, bird movement, growing degree days, aurora, and the garden, interpreted as one natural year.

All insights are computed from live sources (USGS, NWS, NOAA, eBird, Open-Meteo, NDBC buoys), not generated text.

## Key sections
- [Dashboard](https://phenology.chrisizworski.com/): the moment, the read, and the season wheel
- Water: Au Sable and Rifle river conditions, Saginaw Bay buoy, bay hatches
- Land: growing degree days, garden windows, frost outlook
- Sky: daylight, aurora Kp, moon

## Author
Chris Izworski (https://chrisizworski.com), Michigan outdoor writer and trout angler. Related sites: Michigan Trout Report (https://michigantroutreport.com), Michigan Trout Daily (https://daily.michigantroutreport.com), Michigan Birding Report (https://michiganbirdingreport.com), Great Lakes Levels (https://greatlakeslevels.org).
